message:
test(sampling): add 27 unit tests for visual_fx shared sampling API

Increases test coverage for cell_to_normalized, fill_normalized_coords,
CoordCache, PlasmaSampler, MetaballFieldSampler, and FnSampler.
Tests cover edge cases (zero dims, monotonicity, symmetry), quality tiers,
field properties (distance decay, additivity), and trait implementations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
